race.comment: ENERGETIC (2) stuck on well over 1000m first-up at Belmont and ticks a few boxes getting out in distance. Parnham remains in the irons and the extra trip is a big tick for him. Maps to be a little closer this time around and with improvement expected, he can get the job done. YOU CAN CALL ME AL (1) is on resumption here without a trial, but the form at the end of last campaign makes for good reading. This is short of his best trip, but he's been effective behind some handy types at the shorter trips. May get back in the run but watch for him late in proceedings. DREAMS OF DIAMONDS (11) felt the pinch late in the race fresh where he settled handy and ended up 2.5L off the winner. This looks a more suitable event and she can't be left out of calculations. KENTUCKY DRIVE (7) is better than she showed last start and can bounce back to form. DIAMOND CHOUX (8) can feature first-up.
